testcase.name: shouldRegisterAndLoginSuccessfully
testcase.system-out:
02:56:49.390 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.smanioto.bank.auth.controller.AuthControllerTest]: AuthControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 02:56:49.543 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.smanioto.bank.auth.AuthServiceApplication for test class com.smanioto.bank.auth.controller.AuthControllerTest . ____ _ __ _ _ /\\ / ___'_ __ _ _(_)_ __ __ _ \ \ \ \ ( ( )\___ | '_ | '_| | '_ \/ _` | \ \ \ \ \\/ ___)| |_)| | | | | || (_| | ) ) ) ) ' |____| .__|_| |_|_| |_\__, | / / / / =========|_|==============|___/=/_/_/_/
